description_long: This is a medium-sized cardboard shipping box, sealed with a strip of black tape featuring the Amazon Prime logo in white and blue. The box has a rectangular shape with a slightly rough, matte brown surface typical of corrugated cardboard. On one side, there is a large purple label with the text 'TOTAL express' printed in red and blue, partially inverted, and a barcode above it. Another side displays the text 'teste Cesar' in black, also inverted, suggesting the box may have been rotated or labeled for testing purposes. The tape runs centrally along the top and partially down the sides, ensuring the box is securely closed. The overall appearance suggests it is a standard parcel used for shipping consumer goods.
description: A medium cardboard shipping box sealed with Amazon Prime tape and labeled with a purple 'TOTAL express' sticker and barcode.
description_view_0: Shows the front of the box with a large purple 'TOTAL express' label and barcode, and the Amazon Prime tape running along the top.
description_view_1: Displays the opposite side with the 'TOTAL express' label inverted and the text 'teste Cesar' visible, along with the Amazon Prime tape.
description_view_2: Highlights the plain brown cardboard side with only the Amazon Prime tape visible at the top and a torn section at the bottom.
description_view_3: Shows another plain side with the Amazon Prime tape running down the center, with no visible labels or text.
